---
title: "Presentations"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, description, categories]
  categories: true
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

Conference talks and seminar slides. Each presentation lives in its own subdirectory
and is rendered as a RevealJS slide deck within the site.
